entities.name: CAPSICUM
entities.description: The plant species used for genetic and population assessment across 48 accessions

entities.name: EST-SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Gene encoding enzyme based markers used to evaluate genetic and structural differentiation in plants

entities.name: GENETIC DIFFERENTIATION
entities.description: The structural and genetic divergence among plant populations

entities.name: METABOLIC FINGERPRINTING
entities.description: The process of identifying metabolic patterns to shape divergences

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interactions between plants and their environment

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation of genetic diversity among plants

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which plants adjust to environmental conditions

entities.name: GENETIC AND POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and among populations

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A measure of the informativeness of a genetic marker

entities.name: MARKER INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the efficacy of a genetic marker

entities.name: DISCRIMINATING POWER
entities.description: The ability of a marker to distinguish between different genotypes

entities.name: PRIMER POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The variation in primer binding sites used to support marker competency

entities.name: CROSS TRANSFERABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a marker to be transferred across different accessions

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The range of genetic differences identified among accessions

entities.name: NEI GENE DIVERSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic diversity within a population

entities.name: TOTAL SPECIES DIVERSITY
entities.description: The overall diversity measured across the species

entities.name: DIVERSITY WITHIN POPULATION
entities.description: The genetic variation found within a specific population

entities.name: COEFFICIENT OF GENE DIFFERENTIATION
entities.description: A measure indicating the degree of genetic differentiation within the population

entities.name: GENE FLOW
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material between populations

entities.name: AMOVA
entities.description: Analysis of Molecular Variance used to reveal genetic differentiation within populations

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A dimensionality reduction method used to support findings of genetic differentiation
